result.headline: Ziwei reads SPX as favorable
result.subline: Jumen colors the reading; market pulse remains strong_downtrend.
result.short_reading: The mock ziwei reading intentionally mixes market pulse with engine-specific artifact signals for frontend contrast.
result.long_reading: This deterministic mock is not a forecast. It is designed to make cards diverge visually while preserving the same schema as real LLM output.
